## Summary

Describe the user-visible outcome and the reason for the change.

## Verification

- [ ] `swift test`
- [ ] `./Scripts/verify.sh`
- [ ] `./Scripts/build-app.sh`
- [ ] Relevant menu-bar and dashboard flows tested manually
- [ ] Light and dark appearances checked for UI changes
- [ ] Accessibility labels and keyboard behavior checked for UI changes
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated for user-visible changes

## Persistence and privacy

- [ ] No persistence schema change, or migration coverage is included
- [ ] No secrets, private project data, or generated databases are included
- [ ] No new network behavior, or it is documented and justified
